Match:
redis://redis:6379
      SECRET_KEY: ${SECRET_KEY:-staging-secret-key-for-testing-only}
      ENV: staging
      DEBUG: "false"
      PYTHONPATH: /app
      LOG_LEVEL: info
    volumes:
      - ./packages/backend:/app
      - backend_logs:/app/logs
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "curl -f http://localhost:8000/api/health || exit 1"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 60s
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
    networks:
      - pranely-network-staging

  # -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Backend Green (for blue-green testing)
  # -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
  backend-green:
    build:
      context: packages/backend
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    image: pranely-backend:green
    container_name: pranely-backend-green
    restart: unless-stopped
    command: sh -c "cd /app && poetry install --no-interaction && poetry run uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8001 --workers 2"
    ports:
      - "8001:8000"
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql+asyncpg://pranely:${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-changeme}@

    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql+asyncpg://pranely:${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-changeme}@
Author: DevSecOps
Message: fix: resolve health endpoint import issues and add missing test fixture

Match:
redis://redis:6379
      SECRET_KEY: ${SECRET_KEY:?SECRET_KEY required}
      ENV: production
      DEBUG: "false"
      PYTHONPATH: /app
      LOG_LEVEL: info
    volumes:
      - ./packages/backend:/app
      - backend_logs:/app/logs
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "curl -f http://localhost:8000/api/health || exit 1"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 60s
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          memory: 512M
        reservations:
          memory: 256M
    networks:
      - pranely-network-prod

  backend-green:
    build:
      context: packages/backend
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    image: pranely-backend:green
    container_name: pranely-backend-green
    restart: unless-stopped
    command: poetry run uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --workers 2
    ports:
      - "8001:8000"
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql+asyncpg://pranely:${POSTGRES_PASSWORD}@

    environment:

Author: DevSecOps
Message: fix: resolve health endpoint import issues and add missing test fixture

Match:
postgresql://pranely:changeme@postgres:5432/pranely_dev
      REDIS_URL: redis://redis:6379
      ENVIRONMENT: development
    volumes:
      - ./apps/api:/app
      - /app/__pycache__
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
    networks:
      - pranely-network

# =============================================================================
# Networks
# =============================================================================
networks:
  pranely-network:
    name: pranely-network
    driver: bridge
Author: DevSecOps
